title: LGA LaGuardia & Newark RnC 3% Airport Surcharge
goal: Ensure a mandatory 3% airport surcharge is correctly applied and transparently displayed on all RnC orders at LGA, EWR, and Newark airports.
description: To comply with new airport requirements and avoid any surprises at pickup, we're updating our RnC experience to include a 3% airport surcharge when customers place orders at LaGuardia and Newark airports. A clear, informative tooltip is added to the order totals summary during checkout to explain the mandatory surcharge.
